subject: Urgent Request: Backend Engineer – Python – Public sector
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Digitalsverige, a company in the public sector space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Backend Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:

  • Python
  • GCP
  • Kubernetes
  • PostgreSQL
  • PyTorch

Practical details:

  • Start: ASAP
  • Duration: 6 months
  • Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
  • Rate: up to 675 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Lena Eriksson
Business Director
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 73 345 67 89
